# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - name: MyVM
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2019-04-30-preview
    location: eastus
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2
      osProfile:
        computerName: MyVM
        adminUsername: azureuser
        adminPassword: Password1234!
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2016-Datacenter-Graphics
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: MyOSDisk
          createOption: FromImage
        dataDisks:
        - lun: 0
          name: MyDataDisk1
          createOption: Empty
          diskSizeGB: 128

  - name: MyVM2
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2019-04-30-preview
    location: eastus
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS3_v2
      osProfile:
        computerName: MyVM2
        adminUsername: azureuser
        adminPassword: Password1234!
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2016-Datacenter-Graphics
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: MyOSDisk2
          createOption: FromImage
        dataDisks:
        - lun: 0
          name: MyDataDisk2
          createOption: Empty
          diskSizeGB: 128
